title: Creamy Australian Potato Gratin
description: A rich and creamy potato dish with an Australian twist, perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: Peel and thinly slice the potatoes.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, create a layer of potatoes.
Dot the top of the potatoes with butter.
Sprinkle a third of the cheddar cheese over the potatoes.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Pour the heavy cream over the cheese.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 45 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15-20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
